art.summary: Global art market reached $59.6 billion in 2025 (Art Basel/UBS). U.S. auction sales rebounded 23%. Sam Doyle set a new record ($85k) at Outsider Art Fair.
art.notable: Focus on quality and provenance amid market discipline; Impressionist/Modern segments driving recovery.

market.summary: Global equities down 6.8% from Jan highs. S&P 500 dropped 1.9% this week. Oil prices surged on Middle East supply disruption fears (Strait of Hormuz).

stats.Outlook: High volatility expected; investors defensive with cash focus.
